army_customisation.intro:
Army Customisation allows you to further individualise your force. Archetypes change how you build your army by moving around units in the Army Organisation Plan (AOP) or letting you take more of a unit than you would normally be allowed to. Legacies give access to armories and disciplines of legendary factions. Traits enhance your units with special abilities that they normally would not be able to have.

You may select up to the following:
0-1 Archetype, 0-1 Legacy

archetypes.name: Kataphraktoi
archetypes.description:
- Jetbike Custodians can be taken as Troops.
- All units with less than 12" Movement must start the game as passengers inside a transport.
- Units that have no transport option and less than 12" Movement cannot be taken at all.

archetypes.name: Tharanatoi
archetypes.description:
- Allarus Custodians and Aquilon Custodians can be taken as Troops.
- Custodian Guard and Sisters of Silence become Elite choices.

legacies.name: Castellans of the Blessed Worlds
legacies.description: The army has access to the Solar Watch Armory.

legacies.name: Gilded Guardians
legacies.description: The army has access to the Aquilan Shield Armory.

legacies.name: Intruments of His Wrath
legacies.description: The army has access to the Dread Host Armory.

legacies.name: The Hostless
legacies.description: The army has access to the Emperor's Chosen Armory.

legacies.name: Warders of the Dark Cells
legacies.description: The army has access to the Shadowkeepers Armory.
